default.ui_settings_requireRestart: Some setting changes require game restart to take effect

zh-cn.ui_settings_requireRestart: 部分设定变更需要重启游戏才能生效
zh-cn.ui_entry_derivedStats_tooltip: 角色的具体数值。每个数值有自己的计算规则。
zh-cn.ui_fatalError:
遭遇致命错误！游戏无法继续
上为游戏的Error log
请与制作者汇报该BUG！
zh-cn.ui_com_disabled_autofailure_deterministi: （由于开启了%%ui_comPanel_filters_deterministicRolls%%）该指令接受率为0，无法执行
zh-cn.ui_com_disabled_autofailure_tooltip: 该指令的接受率为0，无法执行
zh-cn.ui_comPanel_filters_deterministicRolls_t:
开启后，判定NPC的指令接受度时若成功率>=65%则必定成功，反之必定失败（并且该指令会无法被选择）

推荐开启
zh-cn.ui_comPanel_filters_shortenLogs_tooltip:
开启后，参与多人指令时只会打印一条随机参与者的口上
未开启时，会打印所有参与者的口上（人多时会刷屏，且刷到重复口上的可能性非常大

推荐开启）
zh-cn.ui_prefs_llm_apisetting_toggle: 开关语言模型输出框的显示
zh-cn.ui_prefs_llm_apisetting_descriptions:
所有API相关设定（包括Key）都会存储于Application.persistentDataPath中（Windows系统下在Appdata\LocalLow\Silent Forest\Mist Era\
使用自定义端口时，请使用localhost而非127.0.0.1
zh-cn.ui_comPanel_LLM_title_tooltip:
AI能做到的：
1. 可以执行指令：与/对房间内的NPC执行指令（邀请同行，家具互动，触摸，推倒调教，工作，监禁/释放）
2. 可以识别的数据：
2.1 当前房间所有角色的状态，人际关系，服装，日程表，记忆，立绘关键词，和角色卡信息
2.2 当前战役的lorebook，当前地图的所有楼层和房间，当前房间的所有家具和清洁状况
2.3 当前房间内，玩家所有可执行指令的内容和成功率
3. 指令的成功与否，目前是交给了AI去决定

AI目前无法做到/做得不够好的：
1. 无法让玩家/NPC在地图上移动。
2. 无法开启/结束时停。
3. 无法穿脱衣物。
4. 无法加入进行中的指令
4.1 衍生出的BUG为，如果房间里坐满了NPC在用电视，那么玩家描述‘与NPC一起看电视’会失败（因为无法加入进行中+电视机被占用无法新开）导致指令的结果处理条目会很诡异
5. 最终的耗时计算可能与实际执行的指令不符（耗时过多或过短）
6. 无法连续执行同类型但不同对象一样的指令（例如无法在一次指令内将5片田全部种好，一次只能种一个）
7. 调教中，游戏内的射精计算会与AI的叙述脱节（例如AI只描述调教，游戏处理调教指令时直接射了）
zh-cn.ui_comPanel_LLM_submit_tooltip:
如果对AI聊天功能有疑问，可以鼠标悬停[%%ui_comPanel_LLM_title%%]标题。
修改API等请重开游戏，在主界面的[%%intro_button_editPref%%]->[%%ui_prefs_button_llmSetting%%]中修改
zh-cn.ui_comPanel_LLM_abort_message: 已放弃AI生成。再次点击返回主界面。
zh-cn.ui_debug_tooltip:
开启该选项后，
1. 追加显示一些本不应显示的数据（方便debug）
2. 允许玩家随时睡觉
3. 玩家执行指令不消耗耐力和精力
4. 战斗中可以一键结束战斗并选择结果

zh-cn.ui_management_jobs_edit_tooltip:
更改NPC的每日工作安排
NPC会遵循 工作阵营>家庭阵营>私人时间 的阵营优先级来决定和执行执行时间安排
NPC会在私人时间内安排睡眠时间（优先选择无间断的私人时间）
为了确保NPC适当休息，请确保NPC至少有等同于睡眠时长需求的无间断私人时间
NPC的私人时间行动优先级为 进食>睡觉>娱乐

更详细的解释请见%%helper_messageTitle%%

zh-cn.ui_management_expeditionConfig_allowCamp:
如果远征耗时>=24小时，那么小队会在当前据点的默认睡觉时点全员睡觉。
如果耗时小于24小时，则小队默认不会睡觉而是撑到回来

启用该选项的话，就算远征耗时小于24小时，队伍也会优先睡眠时间

zh-cn.ui_management_expeditionConfig_recurring:

下方可以定义小队重复执行的冷却天数
zh-cn.ui_management_expeditionConfig_prioritiz:
启用该选项的话，小队成员HP不满时会优先休息
不启用的话，小队成员会优先探索，直到 ST EN低于50% 或者 HP小于1

en-us.ui_com_disabled_autofailure_deterministi:
Command disabled due to no chance of getting accepted
(under %%ui_comPanel_filters_deterministicRolls%%)
en-us.ui_com_disabled_autofailure_tooltip: Command disabled due to no chance of getting accepted
en-us.ui_comPanel_filters_deterministicRolls_t:
When toggled ON,
guarantee success on Command acceptance check when overall success rate >= 65%,
and guarantee failure when not (in this case, Command will be disabled)

Recommended setting: ON
en-us.ui_comPanel_LLM_abort_message: AI generation aborted. Click again to return to the main interface.
en-us.ui_comPanel_LLM_title_tooltip:
What AI can do:
1. Execute commands: Issue commands with/to NPCs in the room (invite to follow, furniture interaction, touching, pushdown/training, work, imprison/release).
2. Data recognition:
2.1 Status, relationships, clothing, schedules, memories, portrait keywords, and character card info for all characters in the current room.
2.2 Lorebook of the current campaign, all floors and rooms of the current map, all furniture and cleanliness status in the current room.
2.3 Content and success rates of all executable commands for the player in the current room.
3. Success or failure of commands is currently determined by the AI.

What AI currently cannot do/does poorly:
1. Cannot move players/NPCs across the map.
2. Cannot begin/end time stop.
3. Cannot put on or take off clothes.
4. Cannot join existing commands.
4.1 A resulting bug: If the room is full of NPCs using the TV, the player's description to 'watch TV with NPCs' will fail (cannot join existing + TV fully occupied), causing weird results in the command processing entry.
5. Final time cost calculation may not match the actual executed command (too long or too short).
6. Cannot continuously execute commands of the same type but with different targets (e.g., cannot plant all 5 fields in one command; can only plant one at a time).
7. During training, the in-game ejaculation calculation may disconnect from the AI narrative (e.g., AI only describes training, but the game processes the training command and triggers ejaculation immediately).
en-us.ui_comPanel_LLM_submit_tooltip:
If you have questions about the AI chat feature, you can hover your mouse over the [%%ui_comPanel_LLM_title%%] title.
To modify the API or other settings, please restart the game and adjust them in [%%intro_button_editPref%%] -> [%%ui_prefs_button_llmSetting%%].
en-us.ui_prefs_llm_apisetting_descriptions:
All API related settings (including Keys) will be stored in Application.persistentDataPath (Under Windows: Appdata\LocalLow\Silent Forest\Mist Era\
When using a custom port, please use localhost instead of 127.0.0.1
en-us.ui_prefs_llm_apisetting_disabled: LLM needs to be enabled first
en-us.ui_prefs_llm_apisetting_toggle: Toggle visibility of LLM output box
en-us.ui_quicksave_tooltip: Store current play data into local file
en-us.ui_load_savefileLoc: Save data can be found in /game_root_directory/Save/
en-us.charaDetail_tooltip_canMovePortrait: Portrait position can be adjusted with left click drag and scroll wheel zoom.
en-us.ui_management_overview_dailyReport_toolt:
This area displays an overview of previous day's daily update info, updated daily at 0:00.
It includes the following information:
- Member skill upgrade notice
- Whether all members' daily needs are met
en-us.ui_prefs_button_displaySetting_tooltip: Modify settings related to text and background colors.
en-us.ui_prefs_bgColor_transparent_tooltip: Transparent background overlayed on top of base background
en-us.ui_prefs_textColor_conflict_tooltip: Used when reporting any conflict or alert message requiring attention
en-us.ui_prefs_textColor_hover_tooltip: Color used when Cursor hovers above an interactable button
en-us.ui_prefs_textColor_disabled_tooltip: Color used when a button is not clickable. Also used to display message that are less relevant.
en-us.ui_prefs_textColor_toggled_tooltip:
Color when a button is active.
This color only applies to some buttons, some are hard-coded to use %%ui_prefs_textColor_base%% when toggled.
en-us.ui_prefs_textColor_maxed_tooltip: Used in some menu to display stats that reaches maximum allowed value.
en-us.ui_prefs_logs_clearLogs_tooltip: Enabling this setting is equivalent to setting %%ui_prefs_logs_maxLogsCount%% to 0
en-us.ui_prefs_logs_maxLogsCount_tooltip:
Logs exceeding this number will be deleted.
Each command registration adds approximately 5 to 10 entries.

Maximum value is 150; recommended value is 50 or lower.
en-us.ui_prefs_logs_title_tooltip: Refers to the message interface that prints command success rates/results after a character selects any command
en-us.ui_top_faction_canEat_tooltip: When there is edible meal in Faction inventory, it is possible to get meal in canteen at specific meal hours.
en-us.management_faction_managers_tooltip: Faction members' attitude toward the faction will also impact their attitude toward its managers. (WIP)
en-us.management_faction_home_tooltip:
Home faction has to meet the daily needs of its member characters (such as daily food requirement).
When every characters' needs are met, the everyone's trust in the Home Faction's managers will increase (daily); otherwise, everyone's trust will decrease.
en-us.management_faction_home_temporary_toolti: Same as Home Faction, but with higher priority. Used to handle cases where character leaves home faction for an extended amount of time.
en-us.ui_management_linkStatus_add_tooltip:
Connect current Faction to another one, and offers the following perks:
- Allows traveling from one map to another
- Allows sending member to work at Linked Faction, and earn salary
- Allows trading with Linked Faction (in [%%ui_management_tab_production%%] -> [%%ui_management_production_Trade_TITLE%%]).
en-us.ui_management_linkStatus_remove_tooltip: On remove, will also remove all related Trade order.
en-us.ui_management_linkStatus_remove_error1: Cannot remove existing link when there is Faction Member outside.
en-us.ui_management_linkStatus_tooltip_cannotR: Cannot remove existing link when there is Faction Member outside.
en-us.ui_management_production_addProduction_t: Production orders are evaluated in priority order (from top to bottom)
en-us.ui_management_production_addTrade_toolti: Trade Order will require different currency based on which Faction it's dealing with.
en-us.ui_management_production_jobReqByOrder: Work hours needed to complete remaining orders: $hours$
en-us.ui_management_production_jobReqByMainten: Work hours required to perform daily farm maintenance: $hours$
en-us.ui_management_production_jobAlert: Warning: currently assigned work hours cannot cover daily demands!
en-us.ui_management_production_missingHours: Currently scheduled daily $comname$ work hours does not satisfy order's requirement!
en-us.ui_management_production_missingResource: Currently owned $itemname$ count below order's requirement!
en-us.ui_management_trade_order_typeChange:
Change the executition type of this order.
%%craftCount%%: Purchase a fixed amount of Item
%%craftUntilCount%%: Keep purchasing until reaching the specified amount of item in inventory
en-us.ui_management_production_order_typeChang:
Change the execution type of this order.
%%craftCount%%: Craft a fixed amount of item
%%craftUntilCount%%: Keep crafting until reaching the specified amount of item in inventory
en-us.ui_management_jobs_edit_tooltip:
Change the NPC's daily work schedule.
NPCs will follow this order [Work Faction > Family Faction > Personal Time] to prioritize their work.
NPCs will schedule their sleep time in their personal time (prioritizing uninterrupted personal time).
To ensure NPCs get adequate rest, please make sure NPCs have at least as much uninterrupted personal time as their required sleep duration.
In their personal time, NPC will prioritize Eating > Sleeping > Entertainment.

See %%helper_messageTitle%% for a more detailed explanation.
en-us.ui_management_jobs_schedule_jobpost_tool: Will clear all other jobpost settings
en-us.ui_management_jobs_schedule_jobpost_ext_: Will clear all other jobpost settings
en-us.ui_management_expeditions_partyTitle_too: Click the name on the right to edit
en-us.ui_management_expeditions_partyInventory:
When out exploring, the team will have access to its inventory.
For furnitures and meals, team members will have access to them when resting at camp.

Items obtained during exploration will be stored in a separate inventory and will be send into faction inventory when returning from the expedition
en-us.ui_management_jobs_viewCharaDetail_toolt: Open a detailed info panel on target character
en-us.ui_button_tooltip_exit: Left click on black border, or right click anywhere will also close current menu
en-us.com_special_timestop_tooltip:
Stop time. Only player is able to act during timestop, and NPC in player's team will move with player.
Timestopped NPC cannot act, cannot execute command, but can still be command targets.
en-us.com_special_changeRel_notarget: No target available for relationship change
en-us.com_special_changeRel_tooltip: Propose to change the personal relationship between both parties
en-us.management_jobpost_description_desc:
Work Detail: $description$
Work Hours: $hour$, Hourly Pay: $payout$
$additionalDescription$
en-us.management_modCount_add:
Click +1
when holding CTRL +10
when holding SHIFT +100
en-us.management_modCount_sub:
Click -1
when holding CTRL -10
when holding SHIFT -100
en-us.msg_tradeFailure: Some trade orders failed to complete
en-us.ui_settings_requireRestart: Some settings changes require a game restart to take effect
en-us.ui_entry_derivedStats_tooltip: Derived stats of the character. Each stat has its own calculation rule.
en-us.ui_fatalError:
Fatal Error encountered! Game cannot continue
Above is the game's Error log
Please report this to the developer!
en-us.ui_comPanel_filters_shortenLogs_tooltip:
When enabled, only one random participant's dialogue will be printed during multi-character commands
When disabled, all participants' dialogue will be printed (Can flood the screen when there is many people, high chance of repetitive dialogue)

Recommended: ON
en-us.ui_debug_tooltip:
Enabling this option will:
1. Display some data normally hidden (for debug)
2. Allow player to sleep anytime
3. Player commands consume no Stamina or Energy
4. Can instantly end combat and choose result
%%ui_debug_tooltip2%%
en-us.charaDetail_btn_resetPortraitManager_too:
Character portrait management data is written to the save file upon game start
If the character's portrait JSON is modified after game start, a manual reset is needed to load the modified data

Resetting will lose player-adjusted portrait coordinates and scaling.
en-us.charaDetail_panel_viewHiddenRelationship: If a relationship target character is deleted, that relationship will be moved here.
en-us.charaDetail_panel_skills_tooltip: If the currently executed command meets the skill's applicable conditions, the skill level will be added to the current command's success rate check.
en-us.charaDetail_panel_experiences_tooltips: Lists all of the character's experiences here
en-us.ui_memory_relationship_refused: Requested to become $relationship$ with $target$, but was refused
en-us.ui_management_expeditions_editMembers_to:
Expedition teams cannot include players (as expedition maps have no actual map for interaction) and prisoners.

Once explorable maps are implemented in the future, players will be allowed to join the team to travel to such maps.
en-us.trade_chara_Treatment_tooltip: Decide whether to include the character in the team. If not included, you can choose to take only their equipment.
en-us.trade_chara_Treatment_capture_tooltip:
Add the character to the team as a prisoner.
Upon the team's return, this character will join the faction with the same status.
en-us.trade_chara_Treatment_transfer_tooltip:
Add the character to the team as a member.
Upon the team's return, this character will join the faction with the same status.
en-us.trade_chara_Treatment_rescue_tooltip: This character will return to the original team.
en-us.trade_chara_Treatment_liberate_tooltip: This character will be released (will not join the player's team).
en-us.trade_chara_Treatment_none_tooltip:
Do not include this character in the team.
You can choose to take the equipment they are carrying.
en-us.ui_management_expedition_jobInterruptMIA: Exploration cannot continue due to missing members
en-us.ui_management_expedition_rescueCondition: By dispatching other squads to explore locations with the [$keyword$] keyword and accumulating enough exploration progress, a rescue event can be triggered.
en-us.ui_management_expedition_MIATitle_toolti:
Teams may encounter events during exploration that lead to loss of contact.
After a certain period or by advancing exploration progress, missing members can be rescued by other expedition teams.
Please refer to the mouse-over description of each MIA team for specific conditions.
en-us.ui_management_expeditionJob_remaining_to:
Time-limited explorations will end when time runs out.

Exploration progress affects when MIA teams can return.
en-us.ui_management_expeditionJob_cannotResolv: Team characters may be resting or sleeping at this time.
en-us.ui_management_expeditionConfig_allowCamp:
If the expedition takes >= 24 hours, the team will sleep at the default sleep time of the current outpost.
If it takes less than 24 hours, the team will default to staying awake until return.

If enabled, the team will prioritize sleep even if the expedition takes less than 24 hours.
en-us.ui_management_expeditionConfig_recurring:
If enabled, the team will repeat this expedition at the next departure time after returning.

You can define the cooldown days for the team's repeat execution below.
en-us.ui_management_expeditionConfig_prioritiz:
If enabled, team members will prioritize resting when HP is not full.
If disabled, members will prioritize exploration until ST/EN is below 50% or HP is less than 1.
en-us.ui_map_roomTooltip:
Room: $room$
$furnitures$
Items: $items$
Characters: $names$
Travel time $time$ min
en-us.ui_ap_onHoverTooltip:
Performer: $doer$ (Acceptance Rate $proposal$)
Target: $receiver$ (Acceptance Rate $acceptance$)
Time taken $time$ mins, Cost $costs$
Overall Success Rate $acceptance_final$, Base DC $difficulty$
en-us.ui_ap_onHoverTooltip_comInvalid:
Performer: $doer$, Target: $receiver$
Command cannot be executed due to:
$tooltips$
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_missingBodypart: $name$ lacks the required body part type [$bodytags$] for this command
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_missingExtremeInfl: Requires $name$'s [$bodytags$] body part to be filled to the limit
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_missingInflate: Requires $name$'s [$bodytags$] body part to be filled
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_notAllowPlayer: This command does not allow player participation
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_notAllowNPC: This command does not allow NPC ($name$) participation
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_requireMovement: Requires $name$ to be capable of movement
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_requireExistingJob: Requires $name$ to be currently executing a command with category [$tags$]
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_requireAbsentJobwi: Requires $name$ not to be currently executing a command with category [$tags$]
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_requireCombat: Requires $name$ to be able to fight
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_requireFollowing: Requires $name$ to be currently following the player
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_requireNotFollowin: Requires $name$ to not be following the player
en-us.ui_ap_CharaReqUtility_requireUnconscious: Cannot be executed while $name$ is conscious
en-us.ui_ap_PreEvaluate_requireRoom: Current room [$room$] does not meet conditions: $conditions$
en-us.ui_ap_PreEvaluate_RequireRoomExisting_it: Requires quantity of items with [$tags$] in room >= $requirement$ (Current $count$)
en-us.ui_ap_PreEvaluate_requireSameRoom: $name$ (Current Location $location$) is not in the room $room$ required to execute this command
en-us.ui_COM_Requirements_doerCountInvalid: Too many performers: Current [$count$], Limit for this command [$req$]
en-us.ui_COM_Requirements_requireNoReceiver: This command cannot be executed with a target
en-us.ui_COM_Requirements_toomanyReceiver: This command cannot be executed on so many targets: Current $target$, Max allowed $count$
en-us.ui_RequireExisting_missingPrereq: Missing prerequisite command for this command
en-us.ui_GetValidVariant_notAllowedDuringS: This command cannot be executed during training
en-us.ui_GetValidVariant_initS_exist: All participants are already in training
en-us.ui_GetValidVariant_initS_noJoinable: No targets available to join training
en-us.ui_GetValidVariant_endS: No training job currently available to abort
en-us.ui_GetValidVariant_forbiddenGenderIntera: The interaction category $interaction$ for this command is forbidden in preferences
en-us.ui_RequireContaining_requireContentAbsen: This furniture cannot contain more items (Current contents: $contents$)
en-us.ui_RequireContaining_requireContentExist: This command requires this furniture to contain items (Current contents: $contents$)
en-us.ui_RequireContaining_requireCanMaintain: Contents of this furniture do not require maintenance for now (Current contents: $contents$)
en-us.ui_RequireFactionExisting_jobKeyword: Current faction [$faction$] has no pending [$keywords$] type jobs
en-us.ui_RequireFactionExisting_disallowInNonP: This command cannot be executed in non-player faction [$faction$]
en-us.ui_RequireFactionExisting_disallowInPlay: This command cannot be executed in player faction [$faction$]
en-us.ui_RequireFactionExisting_inventoryItemB: Current faction [$faction$] inventory lacks required [$name$] item
